review_title: A very good decision I am still proud of
description: Difficult. I like it! Had some experience with Workdays in the company before and was at the beginning a kind of sad that little business has not the budget for such software. But now I am even happier because Personio not only is quiete as good - it is even better for small business purpose because it's less complex and allowes to stremline processes better for our needs.
author: Thomas K.
pros: It's HR Software with service for every employee, managers etc. - and so what I like most is, that nearly everybody likes to use it though we did not have much training effort. Big benefit (usualy) is as well, that Personio has an ongoing development nad gets even better every month.
cons: Some "improvements" - especially in design - are not really steps forward but seem to complicate work - but usually respective suggestions are heared and drawn into account.

review_title: Smartest way to access employees informations
description: Personio is the main tool we use in the team, we request time of, track our attendance there, we can super easily access our paycheck and control all contract related informations
author: Adele L.
pros: I love the time calendar the most, it's really easy to keep track of the attendance amongst one's team. The time of requesting is also very practical.
cons: The time tracking system. It's not very self explanatory, and the interface keeps on changing. Too many updates there unfortunately.

review_title: Missing features, unhelpful customer support, no room for error
description: very negative, started ok, but worsened over time- support is very bad - just "here is a link and read about it on our helpdesk page" - there is not time for that- had to push to even get in touch with my account manager- no notification on automatic ANNUAL renewal - this i find very unfair; if we are locked in for another full year and still need to renegotiation the conditions, would expect a call well in time so we can decide to cancel- issues with vacation day calculations
author: Tereza S.
pros: european based company, fairly easy to navigate
cons: customer support is very unhelpful, the tool is immature, there are a lot of logic mistakes - e.g. no room for error - if you mess up, you cannot correct it, you need to delete the whole user.

review_title: Promising product with some challenges, recommended
description: They also have a decent amount of workflows that you can build to automate your processes. Easy to set language you prefer the tool to work in. You can handle proper review cycles, a product still in development but may have a fairly promising future.
author: Bart C.
pros: They are constantly developing and holding the end user in mind fairly well. For the German Market they are very adequate and they can handle complex payrolling and the different bureaucratic administrative requirements in German labour and law.
cons: They sometimes lack specific localisation such as Netherlands holiday allowance. You need to buy extra entities if you fully want to embrace international.

review_title: Best in class employee management tool
description: Personio was easy to use, I could easily figured out how to create tickets, request holidays and simple requests to HR.
author: Babatunde O.
pros: Simple uncomplicated work management app. I love the fact that they made it easy and focused on just what i need to request holidays, view my work documents, request reimbursements and everything related to my employment.
cons: There could be other features for adding quarterly reviews and some reporting to enhance performance review just like some competitors.

review_title: Easy to use tool - easy to handle for employees
description: Easy to use tool - widely accepted through the company, also for all entities and countries. Needs little to no onboarding from user side.
author: Christoph B.
pros: Time submission, absentee, vacation, leave mgmt all in one place. Nice visualization for org structures and easy to self service for employees
cons: Document management such as reference letters are difficult to handle, little automation to write and create.

review_title: A clear, chic intuitive interface with all the relevant info one would look for.
description: Excellent. Clear, chic interface. Also great to have the photos so you know people within the organisation immediately. Easy to edit and request changes with HR.
author: Maia H.
pros: It is very intuitive. I also love the dashboard that gives you a clear overview of the info you need.
cons: I sometimes get confused when the absences are limited to the year (ie overcarried absences arent subtracted from the total).

review_title: User friendly all-around HR-tool
author: Maxi W.
pros: Very user-centered design. The frequently used functions are all accesible within one or two clicks.
cons: It would be great if they would have templates for frequently used times when clocking the working hours. So that you don't have to enter the same times every day manually

review_title: Robust HR Management Sytem
author: Abdul-Gafar A.
pros: Very useful tool for all-round employee management
cons: Can get quite expensive but at the end of the day it's worth the price

review_title: Helpful for the on- and offboarding process
description: It has very good features, I enjoy the options for example for peer and management reviews, but the usability could be improved.
author: Simone K.
pros: I was easy to keep an overview over what still needed to be done, it made the onboarding and offboarding process very easy
cons: I am not a big fan of the layout, it is unnecessarily complex and easy to miss things

review_title: Personio is a all-in-one HR solution for companies
description: - Personio provides a unified system that encompasses a wide array of HR services, serving as the ideal all-in-one solution with its integration capabilities. - By seamlessly communicating with other systems, Personio minimizes administrative workload, eliminating the need for redundant data entry across multiple tools. - Its user-friendly interface simplifies usage for both employees and administrators, enhancing accessibility. - Continual development and release of various features ensure ongoing improvement of the product and therefore the work of HR
author: Carina G.
pros: - Personio boasts exceptional user-friendliness and intuitive design. - Seamlessly integrating with various tools such as an LMS is effortless with Personio. - Its array of features includes document creation, Performance Reviews, and a comprehensive Payroll system. - Personio is committed to continuous improvement, frequently rolling out new features. - Prioritizing customer satisfaction, Personio emphasizes a robust customer success program. - Covering a wide spectrum of HR functions, Personio is a comprehensive HRIS solution, encompassing everything from recruitment to offboarding templates.
cons: So far, the target group of personio has mainly been small and medium sized companies and many of the functions and processes are geared towards this target group and therefore workaround solutions still have to be found for larger companies in some cases
author_profession: Senior HR Project Manager - Learning Development

review_title: Dependable and Easy to use
description: It is a tool that i use on a daily/weekly basis
author: Bastian K.
pros: Usabilty, User Interface, mobile app, Time tracking
cons: There ist nothing about Personio that I do not like.

review_title: Very simple but effective HR tool
description: We were very happy with how Personio was able to boost our HR work. I only used it myself when managing the HR tasks of my department, so I'm not familiar with some of the modules. But the ones I was able to use, I was very satisfied with the automated workflows, report tools, data syncing, and all the other stuff they offer.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The onboarding module was a treat to use for our marketing dept. It's easy to assign and monitor each step within the onboarding flow. The automated assignments and reports are also a great addition
cons: The advanced field options for the course assignments are very limited. There really isn't much advanced logic other than basic if conditionals

review_title: Good value for money
author: Anastassia J.
pros: I like that the usage is easy, quick to understand and that the talent management for recruiting pipelines has a nice overview. In addition, the support reaches out to you asap if you need help and have questions in general - hence, I am never left with doubts.
cons: Unfortunately KPI tracking (for recruiting) is not a strength and a lot of data has to be drawn manually or cannot be tracked at all. However, Personio is currently working on this issue which will be a major upgrade for the future.

review_title: A Futuristic Human Resources Management Platform.
description: It is simple to engage and communicate with employees in real-time with Personio.
author: Asnath G.
pros: I like how Personio automates daily human resources tasks thus eliminating manual and repetitive tasks.It is simple to recruit new employees with Personio.I like ease to track employees time with this tool.
cons: I haven't encountered anything that is unpleasant with Personio as it suits best my human resources management needs.

review_title: Comprehensive HR tool
description: Personio is a user-friendly HR software with a wide range of features. I highly recommend it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love how Personio integrates with all of our other business systems. It makes it so easy to keep track of everything, and it saves us a ton of time.
cons: The pricing for Personio is a bit on the high side, especially for smaller businesses. However, the software does offer a lot of features ans functionality, so it may be worth the investment for most of the organizations.

review_title: Personio Review
description: its Good Personio has very friendly people working for them and the tool does help a lot with day to day business
author: Kelly P.
pros: I like that its a easy to understand product and also the logic it uses is very simple and understandable too.
cons: it has no buildable logic between fields which can cause for incorrect data and also personio is still very Germany focused it becomes very difficult for our other countries with the tool since it can not fully attend to their needs

review_title: Happy administrator feedback
description: On the whole very satisfied. The tool covers our complex requirements very well. Feedback is processed quickly. Personio develops quickly which is mostly positive. Sometimes there are smaller obvious errors with releases. We use the SW over 3 countries. This works quite well. Partly one notices, that it was primarily developed for the German market (e.g. with withdrawals and holidays adaptations). Otherwise, it is a great relief for us compared to the many manual processes we had before. It requires relatively little to no instruction effort for the employees. We have only adapted the presentation of Personio and handed it over to the employees and this works well. Many things can be configured so that you also have control over the data that is captured.
author: Christian S.
pros: It can be easily configured. The fast implementation. Good and fast customer service. All inquiries are answered within 24 hours (weekdays) and 80% of inquiries are resolved within 24 hours. Usually within 6 hours. The software is constantly evolving and is becoming even more customer-friendly.
cons: Partly the red thread through the SW is missing. For example, the date can only be recorded with 24/12/2019 at one location while it must be recorded with 24.12.2019 at another location. There are newer reports, especially in recruiting, where the figures are not correct. Further input fields do not always correspond to the same logic. So you have to be careful in the salary area if you overwrite a number in the salary field, an additional "0" is added. Just some small things.

review_title: A well functioning HR system
author: Lorenz B.
pros: Personio operates seamlessly. The login process is extremely straightforward, and the interface is highly intuitive.
cons: There isn't much negative to say about Personio.

review_title: Good overall HR tool with a focus on user-friendliness
author: Lisa K.
pros: user-friendliness wide spectrum customer service development
cons: a lot of functions are only available with extra costs some points still need development
author_profession: Team Lead HR BP and Payroll

review_title: User friendly HR tool
author: Milind Dilipkumar P.
pros: Interactive user graphical design, with new update important details can be seen from dashboard window.
cons: Personio mobile application is not very user friendly and to use it from mobile web is something i am sure no one likes.

review_title: Good software to keep track of your working hours
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like that you feel like you have everything in one platform. From time tracking to your documents like your monthly payroll. What I really like is that you can easily enter your working hours in a field and then edit the next day directly after saving the last one.
cons: I don't like the Vacation day system. Sometimes the system doesn't recognize that I have more vacation days because I have worked more days last month (therefore entered more working hours)

review_title: Personio is crucial to our daily business
author: Lara P.
pros: Document Creation Tools Exports are really helpful
cons: Constant changes of User Interface is confusing Loading times

review_title: no more excel files, all informationen together when we need it. webbased!
description: We have more time to spent in other subjects, no more excel lists and very important. All the informationen are current all the time and available to everyone from anywhere at any time.
author: Anne W.
pros: It is very easy to use, even if you are not that talented in software/IT, it is very very dynamic and adaptable and the combination in Admininstration and recruiting is perfekt. Personio saves almost half of all work steps and you can include the employee excellent in many of the processes. The allocation of roles works very well and is very thoughtful. And what we really have to highlight. The Customer Support!! Very helpful, professionell and friendly!!! And a very good thing. The Webinare!! this is a perfekt way to get to know everything even better.
cons: There is actually nothing i do not like about the software. It ist very very complex and I still have the feeling that I only know and use 50% of it. But that is a problem I have!! It is not about the software. I have to spent more time on it! Maybe one thing: holiday: if there is a termination and I I finish the employment relationship in Personio the paid vacation days are still the same and do not automaticaly reduce.

review_title: Just 1 word to say hopeless software
description: very bad in fact we are switching to another software
author: Grazia M.
pros: Honestly it's the worst HR service I ever used in 5+ years of experience
cons: A lot of bugs - constantly, the CS never replies and cannot help, a lot of features are extra = you need to pay
